request_payload.exposure_text: As a former civil defense coordinator, I've seen firsthand how underfunded preparedness programs leave communities vulnerable. The 2023 National Security Review found that only 37% of cities meet basic emergency readiness standards. We can't afford to cut funding for local preparedness - it's not just about money, it's about lives. #NationalSecurity #CivilDefense
